## IWorkspace interface

The primary entry point for chocolate applications.

A workspace provides unified access to: - Library content (ingredients, fillings, confections, etc.) - Session creation for editing - Key store for encrypted collection support

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IWorkspace 
```

<tbody><tr><td>

[lock()](./ts-chocolate.iworkspace.lock.md)


</td><td>

Locks the workspace. - Locks the key store, clearing secrets from memory


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[unlock(password)](./ts-chocolate.iworkspace.unlock.md)


</td><td>

Unlocks the workspace with a password. - Unlocks the key store - Loads any protected collections using the now-available secrets


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
